disclosureStages.title: Step 1: Compare service pathways
disclosureStages.description: Start with broad service differences and identify your likely route.

disclosureStages.title: Step 2: Unlock deep requirements
disclosureStages.description: Reveal details only after selecting a service to reduce decision overload.

disclosureStages.title: Step 3: Commit to next action
disclosureStages.description: Move directly to assessment or consultation with a prepared context.
